overall.description: A bus simulator game showing first-person perspective from the driver's seat during a heavy rainstorm. The bus drives through urban streets with active windshield wipers, stops at a designated bus stop to pick up passengers, and continues through the city with wet road conditions and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial road in heavy rain

events.description: overtaking a large black truck on the left side
passing multiple vehicles while maintaining lane position

agents.ego_description: operating the bus on a wet multi-lane road, maintaining steady speed through moderate traffic with windshield wipers active

notable_agents.action: large black truck being passed in the left lane
white car ahead with brake lights intermittently visible

entered.detail: driver's control panel with steering wheel, speedometer, and instrument cluster
wipers actively sweeping back and forth clearing heavy rain from front glass
illuminated navigation screen showing route map and stop information
multi-story city buildings with mixed architectural styles lining the street
tall modern lamp posts along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment shows steady driving on a wet multi-lane urban road during heavy rain. The bus dashboard and active windshield wipers dominate the foreground while various vehicles including a large black truck are passed. Urban buildings line both sides of the street under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching bus stop on urban street

events.description: bus begins decelerating and signaling to pull over to the right
bus comes to complete stop at designated bus stop next to shelter

agents.ego_description: slowing the bus and carefully pulling over to the right curb to stop at the bus stop

notable_agents.action: group of passengers waiting under the bus stop shelter
traffic continuing to pass on the left side of the stopped bus

entered.detail: covered waiting area with glass panels and bench for passengers
pole displaying route information with green destination text
paved pedestrian walkway running parallel to the road

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches a designated bus stop on the right side of the urban street, slowing down and pulling over. A bus stop shelter with waiting passengers comes into view, and the vehicle comes to a complete stop at the curb while traffic continues to pass on the left.

events.description: bus doors open to allow waiting passengers to board
last passenger boards and doors begin to close

agents.ego_description: waiting at the bus stop with doors open while passengers board through the front entrance, checking mirrors for safety

notable_agents.action: passengers entering the bus one by one through the front door
additional passengers waiting their turn to board under the shelter

entered.detail: illuminated ceiling lights visible inside the bus cabin

segments.scene_description: The bus remains stationary at the stop with doors open as passengers board from the right side. The interior bus lights become visible, and the side mirror shows the boarding process. After all passengers enter, the doors begin to close in preparation for departure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with tram tracks and mixed architecture

events.description: bus accelerates away from the stop and merges back into traffic
passing through an intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: accelerating from the bus stop and continuing through the city, navigating past other vehicles and intersections

notable_agents.action: white car ahead moving through the intersection

entered.detail: road junction with traffic lights and crosswalk markings
metal rails embedded in the road surface for tram lines
row of trees along the sidewalk providing greenery

segments.scene_description: The bus departs from the stop and accelerates back into urban traffic, passing through an intersection with traffic lights. The scene features tram tracks embedded in the road, tree-lined streets, and a mix of historic and modern buildings as the journey continues through the rainy city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle navigates a rainy urban corridor, pausing for passengers before merging back into city traffic. It begins with steady driving on a wet multi-lane road, where active windshield wipers clear heavy rain as the bus passes a large black truck and urban buildings under overcast skies. As the bus slows, the camera shifts toward the right to pull over at a designated stop, bringing a shelter and waiting passengers into clear view while traffic continues to flow on the left. The scene then remains stationary as the interior lights glow and the side mirror captures passengers boarding before the doors close in preparation for departure. Finally, the bus accelerates back into the rainy street, passing through an intersection with embedded tram tracks and tree-lined roads flanked by a mix of historic and modern architecture.
